message:
fix(node): chain-anchor hash for push_bounded audit ledger, batch size enforcement, atomicity fixes

- approval_workflow: add chain_anchor_hash to track evicted entries so
  verify_audit_chain doesn't break when push_bounded evicts oldest entries
- zk_attestation: enforce MAX_BATCH_SIZE (256) in verify_batch to prevent
  DoS via oversized attestation batches
- quarantine_controller: defer sequence increment and evidence_log push
  until after graph.ingest_evidence succeeds (atomicity)
- intent_firewall: skip quarantine-full check if effect already quarantined
- health_gate: Display impl uses reason label instead of code()
- rollout_state: import ordering cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
